summary: Email Templates feature testing completed. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all 6 template cards, Edit dialog with Editor/Variables tabs, Preview functionality, Toggle enable/disable, Save, and Reset to Default.
passed_tests: Templates have required fields (event_type, event_label, subject, body, is_enabled, variables)
Templates have variables with key and description
POST /api/email-templates/{event_type}/preview replaces variables with sample data

email_templates_list.details: GET /api/email-templates returns all 6 templates with default content. Each template has event_type, event_label, subject, body, is_enabled, and variables array.

email_templates_page_ui.details: Email Templates page displays 6 cards with event name, variables count, subject, enabled badge, Edit button, and toggle switch.

email_template_update.details: PUT /api/email-templates/{event_type} updates template subject, body, and is_enabled. Returns updated template with updated_at timestamp.

edit_dialog.details: Edit dialog shows Editor and Available Variables tabs. Editor tab has enable toggle, subject input, body textarea. Variables tab shows all available variables with descriptions and Insert buttons.

email_template_preview.details: POST /api/email-templates/{event_type}/preview replaces variables with sample data (e.g., {{lead_title}} -> 'Website Development Project', {{customer_name}} -> 'John Smith').

preview_dialog.details: Preview dialog shows rendered email with sample data. Subject and body variables are replaced with realistic sample values.

email_template_reset.details: POST /api/email-templates/{event_type}/reset soft-deletes custom template and returns default. UI shows 'Template reset to default' toast.

email_template_toggle.details: Toggle switch enables/disables template. Disabled templates show 'Disabled' badge. Toast notifications appear for enable/disable actions.

variables_display.details: Available Variables tab lists all variables with {{variable_name}} format, descriptions, Copy button, and Insert button.

template_persistence.details: Modified templates show 'Modified' indicator. Changes persist after page refresh. Reset removes 'Modified' indicator.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_email_templates.py - Created new test file for Email Templates feature
seed_data_creation: Test templates modified during testing (new_lead, lead_assigned, lead_status_changed, lead_won, lead_lost, follow_up_reminder). All templates reset to default after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Templates feature is fully working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_email_templates.py cover all CRUD operations, preview, reset, toggle, and variables endpoints. Frontend Email Templates page accessible from sidebar. 6 event types: new_lead, lead_assigned, lead_status_changed, lead_won, lead_lost, follow_up_reminder. Each template has configurable subject, body (HTML), and enabled status. Variables are event-specific (e.g., new_lead has {{lead_title}}, {{customer_name}}, etc.).

sendgrid_email.reason: SendGrid API key not configured in backend/.env
sendgrid_email.behavior: Logs warning but does not fail. Info banner on Email Templates page informs admin to configure SENDGRID_API_KEY.

twilio_sms.reason: Twilio credentials not configured in backend/.env
twilio_sms.behavior: Logs warning but does not fail
